Feature: Order Management
Sub - Feature: New UI enhancement
Fixed Cost Service Worksheet (Day/Week/Month)
Description:
Currently, daily services are treated as rentals, which limits support for:

- Shifts
- Assignees
- Clock-in / clock-out
- Overtime tracking

The updated requirement is to reclassify fixed cost services as Services, while preserving rentals as a separate model for products and packages.

Feature: Client Invoice Totals and Breakdown incorrect
“Needs Review” Line Item Handling on Generate Invoice
Sub - Feature:
When a user selects a group of line items for invoice generation, and one or more have the status “Needs Review”,
    - **Current behavior:**
        - No feedback to the user, only the resolved shifts are visible in the generated invoice
        - Why this is bad: the accountant may accidentally not bill for a shift, they have no feedback that items require changes, etc.
    - **The expected behavior would be:**
        - User is warned that one or more items have a status of 'needs review'
            - Actions:
                - Cancel — go back to invoice management view
                - Continue — proceed without the needs review shifts. It needs to be clear to the user that these shifts will not be included in the invoice (need to be handled first)
        - User should have been able to deselect the shift to not include it.

Feature: Past Due Invoices should be included in the Outstanding Invoice View
